body:
# Tri Valor Realistic Shader

Bring your world to life with physical light simulation. **Tri Valor Realistic Shader** introduces fully optimized, cinematic atmosphere and dynamic lighting engines designed to complement high-resolution blocks perfectly.

### 🌟 Advanced Lighting Features
* **Dynamic Lighting & Glow:** Utilizing advanced emissive maps, light sources like lava and torches cast natural, vibrant glows that interact realistically with the environment.
* **Cinematic Water & Reflections:** High-quality calculations provide real-time water reflections and refraction, making oceans and rivers look nearly life-like.
* **Atmospheric Depth:** Enhanced fog, volumetric lighting, and realistic skyboxes create an immersive atmosphere for both underground exploration and expansive surface builds.

---

## 📦 COMPLEMENTARY OVERHAUL
This shader was custom-calibrated alongside our official 512x resource pack. To experience true 3D surface depth (POM) and natural material reflections (PBR) on blocks, pair this lighting engine with:

👉 **[DOWNLOAD TRI-VALOR ULTRA REALISM TEXTURE PACK](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/trivalor-ultra-realism)** 👈
